General.Name: Town Health International Medical Group Limited
General.Description: Town Health International Medical Group Limited, an investment holding company, provides healthcare and related services in the People's Republic of China and Hong Kong. It operates through Hong Kong Medical Services; Hong Kong Managed Medical Network Business; Mainland Hospital Management and Medical Services; and Others segments. The company provides medical healthcare, managed medical network, dental consultation, eyecare, private specialty healthcare, third party medical network administrator, and laboratory testing services. It also offers specialty services that covers cardiology, clinical oncology, dermatology, gastroenterology and hepatology, weight management and diabetes, neurosurgery, obstetrics and gynaecology, ophthalmology, orthopaedics, otorhinolaryngology, paediatrics, plastic surgery, psychiatry, urology, and nephrology; and dental services, such as general dentistry, prosthodentics, periodontology, oral and maxillofacial surgery, endodontics, orthodontics and paediatric dentistry etc. In addition, the company provides health check, and diagnostics and imaging services, such as PET- CT, MRI, CT, ultrasound scanning, endoscopy, cardiological examination, breast imaging, DEXA bone densitometry, X-Ray, lung function test, fundus photography, audiological test and full range laboratory service, etc.; physiotherapy services; traditional chinese medicine services; and medical beauty, body management, and life beauty services. Further, it offers property investment and management, hospital and health management, and business and corporate advisory services, as well as leases properties; and engages in the trading of medical consumables and equipment, and medicines. The company was formerly known as Town Health International Investments Limited and changed its name to Town Health International Medical Group Limited in March 2014. Town Health International Medical Group Limited was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in Sha Tin, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Town Health Medical Group Centre, Sha Tin, Hong Kong
